info.title: Record Locking Configuration
info.description: Record locking configuration allows you to set up the configuration needed to lock the records in modules manually or automatically when certain conditions are met.

post.description: To add record locking configuration for different modules.

schema.description: Request object for  creating of record locking configuration.

items.description: object for  creating of record locking configuration.
A restricted action.
Field descriptor to be excluded from locking.

id.description: Field id.

items.description: A locking rule object.

lock_existing_records.description: Whether to lock existing records matching criteria.

criteria.description: Criteria object used to match records.

items.description: A restricted communication action.
Restricted custom button descriptor.

id.description: Identifier of the custom button.

items.description: Profile descriptor excluded from locking.

id.description: Profile id.

lock_for_portal_users.description: Whether portal users are affected by the lock.

201.description: When the record locking configuration is successfully created for the module, this response will be returned.

code.description: A code representing the successful configuration creation operation.

message.description: A message that provides additional information about the creation operation.

details.description: Object containing identifiers and details for the created record locking configuration.

id.description: The unique identifier of the created record locking configuration.

get.description: To retrieve the record locking configuration for different modules.

200.description: When the record locking configuration details are successfully retrieved for the module, this response will be returned.

schema.description: A JSON object containing the record locking configuration details for the module.

record_locking_configurations.description: List of record locking configuration details for the module.

items.description: An object containing the details of a record locking configuration.

lock_type.description: The type of locking applied to the records.

locked_for.description: Specifies whether the records are locked for all profiles or all profiles except the excluded profiles.

restricted_actions.description: List of actions that are restricted on the locked records.

items.description: An action that is restricted on the locked records.

created_time.description: The timestamp when the record locking configuration was created.

excluded_fields.description: List of fields that are excluded from the record locking configuration.

items.description: An object containing minimal details of an excluded field.

api_name.description: The API name of the excluded field.

id.description: The unique identifier of the excluded field.

feature_type.description: The type of feature for which the record locking configuration is applied.

locking_rules.description: List of locking rules defined in the record locking configuration.

items.description: An object containing the details of a locking rule.

name.description: The name of the locking rule.

id.description: The unique identifier of the locking rule.

lock_existing_records.description: Indicates whether existing records should be locked when the rule is applied.

criteria.description: An object defining the criteria for the locking rule.

comparator.description: The comparator used in the criteria.

field.description: An object containing minimal details of the field used in the criteria.

api_name.description: The API name of the field used in the criteria.

id.description: The unique identifier of the field used in the criteria.

modified_time.description: The timestamp when the record locking configuration was last modified.

restricted_communications.description: List of communication actions that are restricted on the locked records.

items.description: A communication action that is restricted on the locked records.

system_defined.description: Indicates whether the record locking configuration is system-defined.

created_by.description: An object containing minimal details of the user who created the record locking configuration.

name.description: The name of the user who created the record locking configuration.

id.description: The unique identifier of the user who created the record locking configuration.

modified_by.description: An object containing minimal details of the user who last modified the record locking configuration.

name.description: The name of the user who last modified the record locking configuration.

id.description: The unique identifier of the user who last modified the record locking configuration.
The unique identifier of the record locking configuration.

restricted_custom_buttons.description: List of custom buttons that are restricted on the locked records (or null).

items.description: An object containing minimal details of the restricted custom button.

name.description: The name of the restricted custom button.

id.description: The unique identifier of the restricted custom button.

lock_excluded_profiles.description: List of profiles that are excluded from the record locking configuration.

items.description: An object containing minimal details of the profile that is excluded from the record locking configuration.

name.description: The name of the excluded profile.

id.description: The unique identifier of the excluded profile.

lock_for_portal_users.description: Indicates whether the records are locked for portal users.

204.description: When the record locking configuration is not configured for the module, this response will be returned.
